title: FMD - Disconnecting/Connecting earbuds to see how it is displayed on the list and map
scenario: Verify that disconnecting and reconnecting earbuds correctly splits and reunites the device display on the Find My Device list and map, with appropriate "Connected"/"Disconnected" tags per product type.
steps: Connect both earbuds and verify the device is shown as one unit on the Find My Device list and map.

Disconnect the right earbud and verify the device splits into parts with appropriate 'Connected'/'Disconnected' tags per product type:
- Osprey: 3 parts (Left earbud, Right earbud, Charge Case)
- Tern/Emu: 2 parts (Left earbud, Right earbud)
- Flamingo: 2 parts (Earbud, Charge Case)
Disconnect the left earbud and verify both earbuds show as disconnected.
Reconnect the left earbud and verify the device returns to a single unit on the Find My Device list and map.
expected: The device status on the Find My Device list and map correctly reflects each connection/disconnection state: initially shown as one unit, splits into appropriate parts with correct tags when one earbud is disconnected, shows both disconnected when both are disconnected, and returns to a single unit when both earbuds are reconnected.
